queue_context.reason: All canonical frontier_research items were completed; this is an additive implementation handoff rather than a canonical queue rewrite.

primary_source.title: Web Audio API Editor's Draft
observed_requirements: Reports underrun duration, underrun events, total playback duration, and latency statistics.
Statistics update no more than once per second.
Updates are visibility- or microphone-permission-gated for privacy.
Underruns may arise from graph complexity or external system load.

finding: A supporting browser can provide playback-path progress and underrun telemetry stronger than AudioContext.state alone, but the telemetry remains experimental, privacy-gated, non-universal, and does not prove audibility or identify root cause.
design_implication: Feature-detect AudioContext.playbackStats. When present, compare valid snapshots at intervals of at least one second and classify progress, underruns, privacy-gated inactivity, reset/regression, and unsupported behavior. Preserve existing render-position and device/user audibility evidence as independent channels.

verification.environment: isolated Node runtime using byte-equivalent local files before commit
covered_states: sampling interval below specified update period

uncertainty: The cited interface is in an editor's draft and may change.
No browser compatibility or physical-device execution was proven in this run.
No underrun root cause can be inferred from counters alone.
No counter result proves that a human heard sound.
falsification_route: In a browser implementing AudioContext.playbackStats, collect two visible-document snapshots at least one second apart while audio is routed to the destination; induce sustained render overload and verify that underrun counters increase. A failure to expose the API, update counters, or correlate induced overload weakens the implementation hypothesis without proving audio absence.

handoff.action: Integrate this evaluator only behind feature detection as a supplemental diagnostic channel; retain getOutputTimestamp/render-position and physical iPhone audibility evidence as separate requirements.

privacy_boundary: No private chat, health information, credentials, account identifiers, or user-level audio recordings are included.
